title: pinus elliottii subsp. austrokeysensis
intro: Pinus elliottii subsp. austrokeysensis is a subspecies of the slash pine tree, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Pinus elliottii subsp. austrokeysensis include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its safety and efficacy for human use.
